We are not a job-posting group, so our discussions are more focussed than most groups. We aim to produce collaborative, open-source peices of work from time to time - we have our own forum. 🚀 Welcome to the IT & Computer Science Community (IT & CS)

A space for developers, engineers, students, and tech enthusiasts to connect, learn, and grow together.

💡 What we talk about:
Artificial Intelligence (AI), Machine Learning (ML), Data Science, Generative AI, Cloud Computing, Web Development, Mobile Apps, DevOps, Cybersecurity, and emerging technologies.

🛠 Technologies include:
Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, Java, C#, .NET, Go
React, Angular, Vue, Next.js, Node.js
AWS, Microsoft Azure, Google Cloud (GCP)
Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, CI/CD, Git, Linux
SQL, MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, NoSQL, Redis
TensorFlow, PyTorch, APIs, Microservices, System Design
Big Data (Hadoop, Spark), ETL, Data Pipelines
IoT, Blockchain, Edge Computing, SaaS, Serverless

👨‍💻 Who can join:
Software Engineers, Full-Stack, Frontend & Backend Developers
AI Engineers, ML Engineers, Data Scientists, Data Analysts, Data Engineers
Cloud Engineers, DevOps Engineers, Site Reliability Engineers (SRE)
Mobile Developers (Android, iOS, Flutter, React Native)
Database Administrators (DBA), Database Engineers
Solution Architects, System Architects
Product Managers, Technical Program Managers
Business Analysts, IT Consultants, Researchers, Students

🌱 Why join?
✔ Learn trending technologies
✔ Share knowledge, projects, and resources
✔ Discuss jobs, careers, and certifications
✔ Network with tech professionals worldwide

Build, learn, and grow in tech 🚀

Revit Users
Public Group
550K members
Welcome to the Autodesk Revit Users Group!

This group is dedicated to bringing together professionals who utilize Autodesk Revit software in their daily workflows. Whether you're an architect, engineer, designer, or construction professional, this community is your go-to destination for sharing knowledge, discussing best practices, and exploring the latest Building Information Modeling (BIM) trends.

Join us to:

Engage in lively discussions about Revit tools, techniques, and workflows.
Share your experiences and insights on implementing BIM in real-world projects.
Learn from industry experts and fellow users through tips, tutorials, and case studies.
Stay updated on the newest features, updates, and developments in Autodesk Revit.
Connect with like-minded professionals, expand your network, and collaborate with your peers.

Whether you're a seasoned Revit veteran or just starting your BIM journey, this group provides a supportive and enriching environment for all levels of expertise. Be a part of our vibrant community and elevate your Revit skills to new heights!

No AI-generated content. To preserve the value of real-world experience and peer-to-peer learning, we do not allow posts generated or heavily written by artificial intelligence (AI) tools, including ChatGPT, Midjourney, DALL·E, or similar. This includes AI-written tutorials, AI-generated images or renderings, and AI-created videos. Posts must reflect your personal expertise, experience, or inquiry. While AI may be a helpful tool in your process, content shared here should be authored and curated by a human, with clear relevance to Revit use in practice.

Join us today, and let's revolutionize how we design and build our built environment with Autodesk Revit!
Join
ServiceNow |Developer | Engineer | Administrator | ITSM | ITIL
Public Group
4K members
Welcome to the ServiceNow Developer and Administrator ITSM / ITIL Domain Group** on LinkedIn! This group is your go-to hub for all things related to ServiceNow, IT Service Management (ITSM), and IT Infrastructure Library (ITIL). Whether you're a seasoned professional or just starting your journey, you'll find valuable resources, insightful discussions, and a supportive community here.

By joining us, you'll gain access to expert opinions, best practices, and the latest trends in ServiceNow and ITSM/ITIL. This is a fantastic opportunity to connect with industry leaders, peers, and potential collaborators from around the globe. Additionally, you'll discover job opportunities, career advice, and professional development resources tailored for ServiceNow developers and administrators. Enjoy exclusive webinars, tutorials, and articles that can help you stay ahead in your career.

Our group offers a variety of features to enhance your experience. Engage in meaningful conversations about ServiceNow implementations, ITSM strategies, and ITIL frameworks through our discussion forums. Access a wealth of resources including whitepapers, case studies, and toolkits.

To get involved, start by introducing yourself to the group. Share your background, interests, and what you hope to gain from this community. Contribute by sharing your experiences, insights, and resources. Your expertise can help others in their journey. Regularly participate in discussions, attend events, and engage with other members to make the most of this community.

ServiceNow, ITSM, ITIL, ServiceNow Developer, ServiceNow Administrator, IT Service Management, IT Infrastructure Library, LinkedIn Group, Professional Networking, Career Growth, Industry Trends, Expert Insights, Job Opportunities, Webinars, Tutorials, Resource Sharing, Community Engagement.

We look forward to welcoming you to our group and seeing you thrive in your ServiceNow career!
Join

🌐 Welcome to the Networking Aspirants Hub! 🚀

Are you a fresher eager to kickstart your career in the dynamic world of networking? Look no further! This group is your go-to destination for aspiring Network Engineers, NOC professionals, Cybersecurity enthusiasts, and those interested in Network Security.

Why Join Us?

✨ Connect with Like-Minded Individuals: Engage with fellow enthusiasts, share experiences, and build a supportive network.

🛠️ Learning Opportunities: Access valuable resources, study materials, and stay updated on the latest trends in networking.

🤝 Job Opportunities and References: Discover job openings, receive guidance, and connect with professionals willing to provide references.

🌐 Diverse Discussions: From network protocols to cybersecurity trends, participate in discussions that enhance your knowledge and understanding of the field.

👥 Community Collaboration: Let's create a vibrant community where knowledge flows freely, and everyone contributes to each other's growth.

🚀 How to Join:
Click the link below and be a part of this exciting journey: Group Link

🔗 Note: This group is exclusively for freshers interested in Networking, Network Engineering, NOC, Cybersecurity, and Network Security roles.
Join
